data.title: KBRA rates Benchmark 2026-B42, $729.2 million CMBS deal with 123 properties across 43 MSAs, New York leading with 33.9% balance.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has issued preliminary ratings for 15 classes of Benchmark 2026-B42, a CMBS conduit deal worth $729.2 million. These ratings are assigned to a pool of 62 commercial mortgage loans tied to 123 properties across 43 MSAs. The top three MSAs include New York (33.9% of pool balance), Phoenix (11.0%), and Washington - NoVA - MD (4.1%). The collateral properties encompass various major property types, with four specific types accounting for a significant portion of the pool.

data.title: Brandywine Realty Trust declares $0.08 quarterly dividend per common share, $0.32 annual rate; earnings release in Q1 2026.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, Brandywine Realty Trust (NYSE:BDN) revealed that it has authorized a quarterly cash dividend of $0.08 for each common share and OP unit, with the payment scheduled for April 16, 2026, to shareholders of record by April 2, 2026. At an annual rate, this quarterly dividend amounts to $0.32 per common share.

data.title: Fed officials hinted at no urgency for rate cuts, some considering hikes. Fed set for pause unless labor market weakens or inflation cools significantly.
data.description: Unless there is a sudden decline in the labor market or a notable decrease in inflation, the Federal Reserve seems ready to maintain the current course for an extended period.

data.title: Swarm Aero opens advanced manufacturing center in Northwest Arkansas.
data.description: Swarm Aero revealed the establishment of an Advanced Manufacturing Center in Oxnard, California. The company recently held a ribbon-cutting ceremony to celebrate this new facility located in Northwest Arkansas.

data.title: TitleLab™ by Energy Domain cuts title work time from weeks to days with its patent-pending courthouse intelligence product.
data.description: Energy Domain has recently unveiled TitleLab™, a new courthouse intelligence product on their Energy Domain Data platform. This patent-pending tool is designed to streamline the process of creating run sheets and title chains, tasks that typically require weeks of manual work from landman and legal teams. With TitleLab, these tasks can now be completed in just hours or days, saving valuable time and resources. This automation will greatly benefit land teams who spend a significant amount of time gathering courthouse records, purchasing abstracts, and constructing title chains.

data.title: AI-referred traffic converts 3-6 times higher, as per 2026 research by Erlin.ai over PR Newswire. Media contact info updated.
data.description: New studies conducted by Erlin.ai have revealed that website traffic referred by artificial intelligence (AI) results in conversion rates that are 3 to 6 times higher. The findings of this research were released in a news report on February 18, 2026. As per the company representative, the media contact details have been refreshed. The updated information includes the name and phone number for inquiries.
